title.en: VALVES; TAPS; COCKS; ACTUATING-FLOATS; DEVICES FOR VENTING OR AERATING {(devices for emptying and evacuating the excess liquid in valves or conduits F16L55/07)}

Lift valves {or globe valves}, i.e. cut-off apparatus with closure members having at least a component of their opening and closing motion perpendicular to the closing faces ({in combination with sliding valves F16K3/246, F16K3/267} ; diaphragm valves F16K7/00)
with screw-spindle (F16K1/12 - F16K1/28 take precedence; actuating mechanisms with screw-spindles F16K31/50)
with streamlined valve member around which the fluid flows when the valve is opened
with ball-shaped valve member (check valves F16K15/04)
with pivoted closure-members
with valve members that, on opening of the valve, are initially lifted from the seat and next are turned around an axis parallel to the seat
specially adapted for pressure containers
Details (details of more general applicability F16K25/00 - F16K51/00)
Gate valves or sliding valves, i.e. cut-off apparatus with closing members having a sliding movement along the seat for opening and closing (F16K5/00 takes precedence; in barrages or weirs E02B8/04)
with flat sealing faces; Packings therefor
with sealing faces shaped as surfaces of solids of revolution (F16K13/02 takes precedence; with resilient valve members F16K3/28)
with resilient valve members
Details

{Plug valves;} Taps or cocks comprising only cut-off apparatus having at least one of the sealing faces shaped as a more or less complete surface of a solid of revolution, the opening and closing movement being predominantly rotary (taps of the lift-valve type F16K1/00)
with plugs having conical surfaces; Packings therefor
with plugs having cylindrical surfaces; Packings therefor
with plugs having spherical surfaces; Packings therefor
Details
